text: Merged cross-repo value flow (external intrinsics zeroed)
description: Extend the value engine so cross-repo edges propagate flow. Merged aim array = local aims (real intrinsicValue) + referenced external aims with intrinsicValue forced to 0 + the cross-repo edges, fed to the existing calculateAimValues — externals receive value ONLY from inflow. totalIntrinsic stays = local intrinsics, so exporting flow to externals reduces local retained values (intended: value is conserved flow, not aggregate). v1: treat directly-referenced external aims as leaf sinks; cascade into their subtree only when expanded. Add a numeric two-repo fixture test confirming the boundary semantics.

status.comment: Parked 2026-06-27: repo-level-links-only pivot. Merged value flow over external AIMS (zeroed external intrinsics, cascade-on-expand) is replaced by a much simpler model — one zero-intrinsic leaf-sink node per linked repo. Superseded by the new 'repo-link value flow (repo node as leaf sink)' aim under e81b11c3.
